message:
Add comprehensive conflict detection tests

Expand test coverage for DetectConflicts and conflictSeverity:

Severity tests:
- Warning severity: 2 agents with changes >10min apart
- Critical severity: 2 agents with changes within 10min window
- Critical severity: 3+ agents regardless of window

Change type coverage:
- FileAdded + FileModified creates conflict
- FileModified + FileDeleted creates conflict

Edge cases:
- Single change produces no conflict
- Empty input produces no conflicts

Also adds direct tests for the conflictSeverity() function to
validate the decision logic independently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
